## Validation

- [ ] `./scripts/dev_workflow/ci_local.sh` or the relevant subset passed locally
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks passed (or `SKIP_PRECOMMIT` not used)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or local-only archive paths committed
- [ ] All commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the Developer Certificate of Origin
